mapper.sql: m.id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.menu_type, m.route_path, m.component_path, m.permission_code, m.icon, m.sort_order, m.visible_flag, m.status, m.remark, m.created_by, m.created_at, m.updated_by, m.updated_at, m.delete_flag, m.version
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON rm.menu_id = m.id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rm.role_id INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.delete_flag = 0 AND r.delete_flag = 0 AND m.status = 'ENABLED' AND r.status = 'ENABLED' ORDER BY m.sort_order ASC, m.id ASC

SELECT DISTINCT m.permission_code FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON rm.menu_id = m.id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rm.role_id INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.delete_flag = 0 AND r.delete_flag = 0 AND m.status = 'ENABLED' AND r.status = 'ENABLED' AND m.menu_type = 'BUTTON' AND m.permission_code IS NOT NULL AND m.permission_code <> '' ORDER BY m.permission_code ASC
SELECT FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON rm.menu_id = m.id WHERE rm.role_id = #{roleId} AND m.delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY m.sort_order ASC, m.id ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_menu WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND delete_flag = 0
